maharat.name: Maharat Construction Training Center
maharat.description: National vocational training institution dedicated to developing a skilled workforce for the construction sector in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Established 2022 through merger of NCTC and JCC; founded by Saudi Aramco and TVTC. Delivers industry-driven training programs aligned with Saudi Vision 2030.

saudi-aramco.name: Saudi Aramco
saudi-aramco.description: Saudi national oil and gas company; founding partner and key institutional stakeholder of Maharat. Endorses safety and welding programs through its Loss Prevention Department.

tvtc.name: Technical and Vocational Training Corporation
tvtc.description: Saudi national authority responsible for technical and vocational training; founding partner of Maharat.

hrdf.name: Human Resources Development Fund
hrdf.description: Saudi government fund supporting workforce development and Saudization; institutional supporter of Maharat.

sca.name: Saudi Contractors Authority
sca.description: National sector authority for contracting industry in Saudi Arabia; Tier 1 strategic partner of Maharat with active MoU.

colleges-of-excellence.name: Colleges of Excellence
colleges-of-excellence.description: Saudi network of higher education institutions; institutional supporter of Maharat.

nctc.name: National Construction Training Center
nctc.description: Former national training center merged in 2022 to form Maharat.

jcc.name: Jazan Contractors Consortium
jcc.description: Former Jazan-based consortium merged in 2022 to form Maharat.

sinopec.name: Sinopec Nanjing Engineering Middle East Co., LTD.
sinopec.description: International EPC and engineering company; Tier 1 strategic partner of Maharat. Co-brands the Safety Experience Center and Advanced Welding Academy; supports the Advancing Trainee Development Initiative (ATDI).

nesma.name: Nesma & Partners
nesma.description: Major Saudi contracting and industrial services company; Tier 1 employer partner of Maharat. Active MoU covering workforce supply and training alignment.

samsung-ea.name: Samsung E&A
samsung-ea.description: Korean engineering and construction company; strategic partner of Maharat. Sponsors dedicated training cohorts and employer-linked workforce development programs.

esab.name: ESAB
esab.description: Global welding and cutting technology leader; Tier 1 technology partner supplying advanced welding systems and technical support to Maharat.

tuv-sud.name: TÜV SÜD
tuv-sud.description: International technical inspection and certification organisation; Tier 1 partner providing NDT qualifications and safety engineering credentials.

njupt.name: Nanjing University of Posts and Telecommunications
aliases: Nanjing University of Posts and Telecommunications
njupt.description: Chinese university; Tier 1 academic partner of Maharat. Joint programs on smart infrastructure, IoT, AI, and green energy solutions.

neft-energies.name: NEFT Energies
neft-energies.description: Industry partner for technical collaboration with Maharat.

accet.name: Accrediting Council for Continuing Education and Training
accet.description: U.S.-based international accreditor of continuing education and training institutions. Maharat holds ACCET institutional accreditation.

masar.name: Masar National Accreditation Framework
masar.description: Saudi national accreditation framework for vocational training; Maharat is accredited.

nocn.name: NOCN Group
nocn.description: International awarding organisation providing vocational qualifications; Maharat holds centre approval and active partnership MoU.

city-guilds.name: City & Guilds
city-guilds.description: International vocational education and qualifications organisation; Maharat holds centre approval.

gatehouse-awards.name: Gatehouse Awards
gatehouse-awards.description: UK-based awarding organisation; Maharat is an approved training centre.

aws.name: American Welding Society
aws.description: U.S. professional society setting welding standards and education frameworks. Maharat programs are aligned with AWS SENSE and the organisation holds an active MoU.

iosh-org.name: Institution of Occupational Safety and Health
aliases: Institution of Occupational Safety and Health
iosh-org.description: International professional body for occupational safety and health; Maharat offers IOSH-certified training.

cert-iso-9001.name: ISO 9001:2015
cert-iso-9001.description: International standard for quality management systems; Maharat is certified.

cert-iso-21001.name: ISO 21001:2018
cert-iso-21001.description: International standard for educational organization management systems; Maharat is certified.

cert-aws-sense.name: AWS SENSE
cert-aws-sense.description: American Welding Society's School Excelling through National Skills Education framework; Maharat is a recognised SENSE institution.

cert-cwqap.name: CWQAP
cert-cwqap.description: Construction and Welding Qualifications Accreditation Programme; certification pathway offered through Maharat.

cert-gptw.name: Great Place to Work
cert-gptw.description: International workplace culture certification; Maharat certified for 2025–2026.

program-welding.name: Welding Technician Program
program-welding.description: Core one-year technical program in welding and fabrication, leading to Associate Diploma.

program-automated-welding.name: Automated Welding Program
program-automated-welding.description: Two-year flagship program in automated welding systems; leading to full Diploma. Uses advanced ESAB equipment.

program-pipefitting.name: Pipefitting Technician Program
program-pipefitting.description: Technical program in piping systems design, installation, and maintenance.

program-electrical.name: Electrical Technician Program
program-electrical.description: Technical program in electrical systems for industrial and construction environments.

program-instrumentation.name: Instrumentation Technician Program
program-instrumentation.description: Technical program in industrial instrumentation and control systems.

program-construction-safety.name: Construction Safety Program
program-construction-safety.description: Technical program in occupational safety, health, and construction risk management. Endorsed by Saudi Aramco Loss Prevention Department.

program-scaffolding.name: Scaffolding Program
program-scaffolding.description: Technical program in scaffolding systems erection, inspection, and dismantling. Endorsed by Saudi Aramco Loss Prevention Department.

program-civil.name: Civil Construction Program
program-civil.description: Technical program in construction methods, materials, and site operations.

program-atdi.name: Advancing Trainee Development Initiative
program-atdi.description: International graduate development program co-developed with Sinopec and NJUPT; provides advanced learning and professional exposure for Maharat graduates in China and globally.

program-short-courses.name: Short Courses Portfolio
program-short-courses.description: Portfolio of professional short courses including HSSEQ, Rigging & Lifting, Site Inspection, Environmental, and Advanced Welding clusters.

facility-main-campus.name: Main Campus
facility-main-campus.description: Primary Maharat training campus housing all technical workshops, learning resources, and support facilities.

facility-advanced-welding.name: Advanced Welding Facility
facility-advanced-welding.description: Modern welding facility equipped with ESAB automated welding systems; supports the Automated Welding Program.

facility-safety-training.name: Construction Safety Training Center
facility-safety-training.description: Dedicated safety theory and practical training facility including hazard simulation and emergency response area.

facility-learning-resource.name: Learning Resource Center
facility-learning-resource.description: Academic support hub with digital learning resources and library services.

facility-short-courses-center.name: Short Courses Center
facility-short-courses-center.description: Dedicated facility for professional development and short course delivery.

person-mansour-al-shehri.name: Eng. Mansour Al-Shehri
person-mansour-al-shehri.description: Chairman of the Maharat Board of Trustees; Vice President, Liquids to Chemicals Project Management at Saudi Aramco.

person-mishari-al-qahtani.name: Eng. Mishari Bin Abdullah Al-Qahtani
person-mishari-al-qahtani.description: Vice Chairman of the Maharat Board of Trustees; General Manager, TVTC Eastern Province.

person-sami-musalli.name: Sami Musalli
person-sami-musalli.description: Managing Director of Maharat; institutional voice on workforce readiness, mission, safety culture, and partnership strategy.

person-muntaser-ali.name: Muntaser Ali
person-muntaser-ali.description: Business Development and Partnerships lead at Maharat.

initiative-vision-2030.name: Saudi Vision 2030
initiative-vision-2030.description: Saudi Arabia's national strategic transformation program; Maharat directly supports workforce development objectives under Vision 2030.

initiative-safety-experience-center.name: Safety Experience Center
initiative-safety-experience-center.description: Planned simulation-based safety training center co-branded with Sinopec; strategic expansion initiative.

initiative-automated-welding-academy.name: Automated Welding Academy
initiative-automated-welding-academy.description: Planned advanced welding specialization academy; supported by Sinopec as part of the strategic partnership.

initiative-saudization.name: Saudization
initiative-saudization.description: Saudi national policy to increase participation of Saudi nationals in the workforce; key objective that Maharat supports.

location-saudi-arabia.name: Saudi Arabia
location-saudi-arabia.description: Kingdom of Saudi Arabia; where Maharat operates.

location-eastern-province.name: Eastern Province
location-eastern-province.description: Saudi Arabia's Eastern Province; primary operational region for Maharat and Saudi Aramco.
